desc: a direct @event handler reading `$event.currentTarget.value` must typecheck under a strict consumer: the synthesized param is annotated with the host element's specific currentTarget (`InputEvent & { currentTarget: HTMLInputElement; target: Element }` on Solid; both narrowed on Lit) — not a bare Event/InputEvent whose .currentTarget is EventTarget|null
discoveredBy: shape-matrix torture harness (spike 012, event-param typing pass)
